subcodes.first_line: All glory, shining forth from the horizon of eternity, rest upon him who hath drunk the wine of steadfastness from the bountiful hand of his Lord, the Most Generous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء المشرق من افق البقاء علی من شرب رحیق الاستقامه من ید عطاء ربه الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
